snippet.title: MUTTON BONE MARROW | Chettinad Mutton Bone Marrow Cooking and Eating in Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook 100+ mutton bone marrow with the traditional Chettinad method. Mutton bone marrow is one of the tastiest piece in the mutton recipe. 

We collect a huge amount of bone marrow to make this mutton recipe.

We enjoy this traditionally cooked mutton bone recipe with our mutton gravy.

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: Chambdi Baba Bhagaye Bhoot | RajKummar Rao | Janhvi Kapoor | Varun Sharma | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Lo bhai aa gaya humara ek aur bollywood collab after ages
Roohi is releasing on 11th March
ONLY AND ONLY IN CINEMAS
JAANA AUR ZAROOR DEKHNA
Bhai maza aa gaya ye waale video mein kyunki apne iss video mein hai Rajkummar bhaiya, Varun bhai aur Janhvi Kapoor
Toh hum log jab goa mein apni mara rahe the tab apne @JioStudios  aur @Maddock Films  waalo ne apne ko bola ki bhai ek acha saa video bana na hai roohi ke star cast ke saath, waise toh bollywood collabs karna kaafi kamm kar diye hai (time nai re abhi ACV team ke paas, kaun mumbai jaye Ulhasnagar se😂😂) lekin ye waali star cast mein apne Raj bhai hai, jo actor ke roop mein kuch zyada hi ache insaan hai❤️ aur Varun Sharma ke saath toh apna pehle rishta tha
Toh hum mana nai kar paye
Plus Janhvi pe apun ko crush tha 😂😂
Upar se film ke producer Dinesh Vijan bhi kaafi respectful aur pyaare the, toh jab bhi bollywood se ache humble log milte (jo rare hota hai😂😂) humara dil kehta ki inke saath toh kaam karna hi chahiye
Islie bas humne kuch darawani movies dekhi apne bhootiyapa ko badaya aur ye script likhi jo hai chambdi baba ka part 2
Ye waala video end tak zaroor dekhna kyunki isme bahut masti hai aur kaafi zyada improvisation hai (all thanks to legend RAJKUMMAR RAO)
Production :
@Jashan Sirwani  , @Tanish Sirwani  , @Ritesh Sadhwani  toh hamesha hi hote hai
Is baar @Rohit Sadhwani  aur Grishim bhi chale kyunki bollywood ka collab tha, waise harami ke bache 2 din call nai uthate 
Main ek whatsapp kiya ki Rajkummar Rao se milne jaa rahe
Ghar ke neeche pahuch gaye saale
Iski script maine aur @Jashan Sirwani  ne saath mein likhi hai kyunki @Kunal Chhabhria  mc ko Ambernath se Ulhasnagar aane mein bhi bahut time lagta hai
Traffic ne dhanda kharab kar diya hai
Shoot humara Cinderella @Siddharth Kedare aur @Kunal Chhabhria ne kiya kyunki camera inke paas girvi rehta hai... bhadepe chalate hai aur kamate hai, mujhse paise nahi lete hai iss liye inko jhelna padta hai.
Baaki humara super super thanks to
Jio Studios jinhone hume phone karke ijjat di😂
Maddock films jinhone saamne se humari ijjat cheeni nahi😂
Rajkummar Rao jinse bahut saari cheeze seekhni ko mili, jaise ki jitna zyada talented banda utna kam ghamand🔥
Varun Sharma jinki comic timing aur expression meri acting distract kar rahi thi
Aur Janhvi Kapoor jinki maine raj bhai aur Varun bhai ne bahuuut taang kheechi 😂😂
All in all maza aa gaya please ye movie cinemas ke jaake zaroor dekhna
ROOHI IS RELEASING ON 11TH MARCH❤️

#Roohi #11thMarch #AshishChanchlani #RajKummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #MaddockFilms #JioStudios

snippet.title: Highlights - Mumbai City FC 2-1 ATK Mohun Bagan - Final | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
Mumbai City FC beat ATK Mohun Bagan 2-1 in the 2020-21 #HeroISLFinal to win their first-ever #HeroISL trophy! 

David Williams broke the deadlock in the 18th minute but an unfortunate own goal from Tiri brought the Islanders level just before the half-hour mark. The match appeared to be headed for extra-time but Bartholomew Ogbeche made the most of an error from the Mariners' backline and set up Bipin Singh for the match-winning goal!

That result saw Mumbai City FC become the fourth different champion in the tournament's history and also the first team to do the double! 

Tell us your favourite moment from what was an exciting contest at the Fatorda Stadium!

#MCFCATKMB #LetsFootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

To subscribe, click - https://bit.ly/35AzdBp

snippet.title: Feel the Power -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'Feel the Power', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Watch and listen to this energetic and unforgettable track composed by Thaman S that'll make you 'Feel The Power.'

Putting up a pompous show led by Puneeth Rajkumar, Jaani Master's style will keep you hooked to the screen. With a perky musical score, Feel The Power shall mark a new era.  
Shashank Sheshagiri's voice, Santhosh Ananddram's lyrics will leave you with a fantastic experience. 

See, Share, and make it a part of your music playlists! Get a load of more such Kannada videos, Kannada songs, and Kannada cinema updates by subscribing to Hombale Films YouTube Channel.
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

en.description:
Presenting 'Feel the Power', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Watch and listen to this energetic and unforgettable track composed by Thaman S that'll make you 'Feel The Power.'

Putting up a pompous show led by Puneeth Rajkumar, Jaani Master's style will keep you hooked to the screen. With a perky musical score, Feel The Power shall mark a new era.  
Shashank Sheshagiri's voice, Santhosh Ananddram's lyrics will leave you with a fantastic experience. 

See, Share, and make it a part of your music playlists! Get a load of more such Kannada videos, Kannada songs, and Kannada cinema updates by subscribing to Hombale Films YouTube Channel.

snippet.title: Puaada | Official Trailer | Ammy Virk | Sonam Bajwa | 2nd April | Punjabi Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Presenting the official trailer of the upcoming Punjabi Rom-Com #Puaada starring Ammy Virk, Sonam Bajwa. This film is directed by Rupinder Chahal and produced by Atul Bhalla, Pawan Gill, Anurag Singh, Aman Gill, Balwinder Singh Janjua. Puaada also stars  Anita Devgan, Hardeep Gill, Seema Kaushal, Sukhwinder Singh Chahal, Nisha Bano, Gurpreet Bhangu, Prakash Gadhu, Sukhwinder Raj, Mintu Kappa, Honey Mattu.
Co-Producer – Aditya Shastri
Story & Screenplay – Balwinder Singh Janjua, Rupinder Chahal, Anil Rodhan
Additional Screenplay & Dialogues – Rakesh Dhawan
Director of Photography – Anshul Choubey
Editor – Manish More
BGM - Sandeep Saxena
Music Director – V Rakx Music
Lyrics – Happy Raikoti Harmanjeet
Sound Designer & Re-Recording Mixer – Pranam Pansare (SoundIdeaz Studio)
Production Designer – Sheena Saini
Costumes – Roma Sharma, Karishma Sharma
Choreographer – Arvind Thakur
Song Mix & Master, Bgm Sound Engineer – Bhanu Thakur
Lyrics - Happy Raikoti & Harmanjeet Singh
Di Colourist – Tushar Desai
Associate Editor – Gaurav Rai
Executive Producer – Rupesh Mali

snippet.title: Punjab schools to shut again| ਪੰਜਾਬ 'ਚ ਸਕੂਲਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਮੁੜ ਲੱਗਿਆ ਤਾਲਾ
snippet.description:
ਚੰਡੀਗੜ੍ਹ : ਪੰਜਾਬ ‘ਚ ਕੋਰੋਨਾ ਵਾਇਰਸ ਦੇ ਮਾਮਲੇ ਇਕ ਵਾਰ ਫਿਰ ਵਧਣੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਹੋ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ਜਿਸ ਕਰਕੇ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਸਰਕਾਰ ਨੇ ਮੁੜ ਸੂਬੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਖ਼ਤੀ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤੀ ਹੈ। ਅਜਿਹੇ ‘ਚ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਵਿਭਾਗ ਵੱਲੋਂ ਵੀ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਦੇ ਸਕੂਲਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਮੁੜ ਤਾਲਾ ਲਗਾਉਣ ਦਾ ਫ਼ੈਸਲਾ ਲਿਆ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

Read more: https://bit.ly/3te3qBa

Punjab schools to shut again

#PunjabSchools #Punjab #Covid19Punjab #PunjabNews #CoronavirusPunjab #PreparatoryLeaves

snippet.title: Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Season 2 | Web Series | Official Trailer | Episode 1 out on 15th March
snippet.description:
The trio is back with Operation MBBS Season 2 💥
A year full of laughs, tears and goosebumps with Nishant, Huma & Sakshi. 
Will they be able to survive this second year of medical college? 

Here's presenting India's first web series dedicated to the duty and sacrifice by our doctors and frontline warriors 💖

Find out on 15th March, 2021. Stay tuned 📅
#AyushMehra #AnshulChauhan #SarahHashmi

Episode 3121: Bhogilal Tries To Run Away
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal locked Everyone inside Jethalal's house and called the police. Bhogilal tries to run away but someone from Gokuldham has punctured his car and while Bhogilal and his lawyer reach the society's main gate Tapu Sena caught him. Can Jethalal save his Land and money?  Watch the full episode now.

Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Above All (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021 | Punjabi Songs
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents New Punjabi Song of 2021 Above All By Jassa Dhillon Ft Gur Sidhu.

Listen to Above All on all audio streaming platforms: https://jassadhillon.bfan.link/above-all.yde

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/1nVZq7TGWWHfmKGeo535zJ

Gaana: https://gaana.com/album/above-all-punjabi-1

Track Credits:
Title: Above All
Singer: Jassa Dhillon Ft Gur Sidhu
Lyrics/Composer: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: J Statik
Director/DOP:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Ishika & Manisha
Instagram Promotions - Boss Music Productions
Edit  : GS Bhari 
Colour Grading : Prashant B Dhotre
Vfx by - Amit P Sharma
Special Thanks - Big Media & YGD Media
Producer - Nav Sandhu
Label : Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri
Media Promotions: Cross Media

Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta​

Lyrics:

Kon kahinda jatt maade aa hunde,
Vair paye maade bass jatta de,
Chande aa gandase rahinde,
Bulliya te haase rahinde,
Gaira vich khof rahinda,
Khade velly paase rahinde , 
utre dunaali vicho chopra te charde,

Arde ni gabbru ta jahra vicho vadd de,
Yaar te pyaar piche moohre hoke lad de,
Harde na yaar sohniye raule mukde na hunde kade vatta de,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de,


Ucchiya udaariya ,niviya farrariya,
Dass keda sher jithe mallan naio mariya,
24x 7 lohr aa ni vakhri g tohr aa,
Ni nave terе shehar ch puraanya te jor aa,
Bharde na takk balliyе vajj de aa fair jado patta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de


Gur Sidhu Music
Tattiya taseera ne , piche piche heera ne,
Sadde utte hath kude pakkya fakeera de,
Pale aa tufana vich , jamme aa mayan vich,
Tikkhe nale tez kude jive shamsheera ne,
Banya vajood sada todya ni jana,
Haqqa piche lade jatt modya ni,
Vakap ne saare keda janda ni dhillon nu,
Gutt kabbi khana toh marodya ni jana ,
pahila jede saan vajde , 
picho chalde bhaar kahinde latta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa ,
hunde vair paaye maade bass jatta de,


Dass keda aa vangarda , hune jatt thalda,
Mosam de saab naa ldaayi munda bhalda,
Mare na zameer kyoki ziddi jatt jyonde ne,
Ginti ch nio heere gaddara ch aunde ne,
Mode arrbi bandook awe teda takk na,
Kammm hustle aundi jithe aunda lakh na,
Jado jado jatt jud Saab lagde ne bottla de datta de , 
kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paaye maade bs jatta de.

snippet.title: BAWAAL (Official Video) | MJ5 | Latest Song 2021
snippet.description:
MJ5 Entertainment presents Artist “MJ5” with their first debut single and official music video “Bawaal. After this long journey as a dance crew, with your love and support, we are now here as the “First Indian Boy Band”. The singers are none other than the band members Kartik, Rohit, and Dennis. We wish to spread the happy fun vibe for “MJ5ers” and all the people out there who are going through something and need a pick me up. “Ek hi Zindagi hai guys, thodi masti aur maaza toh hona hi chahiye – Cheers to life”.

We hope you all like it :) 

#Bawaal #MJ5

Produced & Conceptualised by - Nitish R Kumar

Song  - Bawaal
Singer - Kartik, Rohit & Dennis
Music - Dixant
Lyrics - Nitish & Dixant

snippet.title: क्या Jetha का Plan होगा कामयाब? - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep 3118-9thMarch, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-arrives-1000110505?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3118: Will Jetha's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal is in the Gada household and is in talks with Champaklal and Taarak regarding the property's paper with Sunder looking over the deal. Whilst talking, Champaklal mistakenly utters the Gada surname. This forces him to weave a story of his own to remove any doubts in Bhogilal's mind. At the same time, the other members of the society and waiting for Bhogilal to fall into Jetha's trap. Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:
Samay ki Sui Exam Par Atak Gayi Par Dariye Mat Exams Toh Aate Jaate Rehte Hain Lekin Hausla Kum Nahi Hona Chahiye.Ek Naya Video Layi Hoon Aapke Mood ko Happy Aur Cheerful Karne k Liye. And Don’t Forget to Like Share & Subscribe as Much as You Can. Best Of Luck For Your EXAMS !!

Leave your Stress and Nervousness Behind and Get Ready to Set those Butterflies in your Stomach Free! On Popular Demand, This Time, The Prime Minister’s Massively Popular Interaction will not only have Students but also Parents and Teachers.It is always a joy to watch Hon'ble PM Shri @narendramodi interact with students in the Pariksha Pe Charcha. Let us all join the Festivities of
Exams and help our young Friends defeat Exam Stress. Participate in #PPC2021 and stand chance to interact with hon'ble Prime Minister.

Participation Link : https://innovateindia.mygov.in/ppc-2021/

snippet.title: Poove Unakkaga - Promo | 13 March 2021 | Sun TV Serial | Tamil Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Latest Promo of popular Tamil Serial #PooveUnakkaga that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

snippet.title: महाशिवरात्रि की रात ये गलती न करें | Don't Do This Mistake | Sadhguru Hindi
snippet.description:
इस महाशिवरात्रि पर सद्गुरु 10 लाख से ज़्यादा रुद्राक्ष प्राण-प्रतिष्ठित करेंगे। यह रुद्राक्ष और दूसरी सामग्रियां सभी साधकों को फ्री भेंट की जाएंगी, जिससे उन्हें साधना में मदद मिलेगी। रुद्राक्ष प्राप्त करने के लिए इस लिंक पर जाकर रजिस्टर करें : https://isha.co/Rudraksh-Hin

एक योगी, युगदृष्टा, मानवतावादी, सद्‌गुरु एक आधुनिक गुरु हैं, जिनको योग के प्राचीन विज्ञान पर पूर्ण अधिकार है। विश्व शांति और खुशहाली की दिशा में निरंतर काम कर रहे सद्‌गुरु के रूपांतरणकारी कार्यक्रमों से दुनिया के करोडों लोगों को एक नई दिशा मिली है। दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को आनंद के मार्ग में दीक्षित किया गया है। 

सद्‌गुरु एप्प डाउनलोड करें 📲
http://onelink.to/sadhguru__app

ईशा फाउंडेशन हिंदी ब्लॉग
http://isha.sadhguru.org/hindi

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 06 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th March 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 06 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

snippet.title: சீ S01 E01 - இந்த உலகமே குருடாய் போன கால கட்டத்திலும் போர்!  Mr Tamilan TV series Dubbed Review
snippet.description:
ஸ்பார்ட்டகஸ், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cms3J7yd-PZw6i8yvxvRVsL0 

கேம் ஆப் த்ரோன் எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvQJVpgEhGHzhWYkIwv-K79 

மணி ஹெய்ஸ்ட், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvIDmOkZOfaASz7isTkqQC0 

சூப்பர் நேச்சுரல், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmuUrBMYJqojFflA4u3ccegx

உலக சினிமா உள்ளூர் மொழியில். There are 80 million people who speaks Tamil language. But only half population knows English. How they will taste the world of Hollywood TV Series? as not all foreign language TV series are being dubbed in Tamil. So, We are just reviewing TV series in Tamil language for those Tamil people who don't know English.

In this Mr Tamilan SERIES channel, we will cover the following genre TV Series

Fantasy TV Series
Horror TV Series
Action TV Series
Adventure TV Series
Science-Fiction TV Series
Historic TV Series
Comedy TV Series

If you would like to remove any clips i have used in this video, send a email to slicemind@gmail.com and your clips will be removed immediately. We have invested lot of time and effort to raise this channel. Please don't give copyright strike, instead ask me to remove your clips or raise a copyright claim to get the advertisement revenue. I am happy to give the revenue to you.

snippet.title: Kadhal Ne Kaayam Ne | Climax | Tamil Web Series | Circus Gun Tamil | Silly Monks
snippet.description:
Kadhal Ne Kaayam Ne | Episode 8 | Tamil Web Series | Circus Gun Tamil | Silly Monks

Bala  asks Nivedha who the father of the baby is.? Nivedha gets angry because she was doubted and takes Bala to the hospital to perform a DNA test for the baby. Bala is shocked when Nivedha requests for a DNA test to be performed. The doctor then confirms the results with which Bala is shocked.  Bala convinces Nivedha and confesses what he feels about her. Later Bala talks to Shiva and finds out what happened to Priya and gets to know the truth about Priya's condition which Priya also overhears. 
What happens next? 

#KadhalNeKaayamNe​​​ #TamilwebSeries​​​ #CircusGunTamil​​​ 

Full Series: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YZXzi...​

Episode 1: https://youtu.be/YZXziKlhCvU​​​

snippet.title: Missamma || Episode - 4 || Vaishnavi Chaitanya || Arjun Kalyan || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
From the creators of #softwaredevloveper comes a story of innocence, gumption and redemption. Follow and enjoy the journey of "Mahalakshmi" as she traverses through life's emotions with grit and panache. 

"Missamma" is a Telugu  Web Series Featuring Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan & Avinash Reddy Anam

Cast:- Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan, Avinash Reddy Anam, Ashwini, Mounica, Satish, Sathwik G Roy, 

Directed by Venkat Rdy ( Naani )

Written - Prashanth Babu Ragathi

Editing :- Shiva Pavan

DI :- Raj Krish

Cinematography  - Bhanu Prakash Musmuri

Sound engineer - Vamshi Vinod Nalli ( Nani )

Title and Poster designer - Nikhil Concepts

Title Animation :- Konte Pavan kumar   

Executive Producer - Sri Vidya P 

Line Producer - Rishi Reddy

Music - Srujan Shashanka

Gimbal Operator - Prashanth Narala

Producer : Infinitum Media

#VaishnaviChaitanya is known for her music videos and cover songs and for acting in the Blockbuster Movie "Ala Vaikunta Puram Lo"

" Vaishnavi Chaitanya is a Telugu comedy & Entertainment Youtube Content Creator &  Actor at Telugu Film Industry

This is produced by Infinitum media.

#Missamma

snippet.title: CID MOOSA | PRAGATHI
snippet.description:
'CID MOOSA' An evergreen comical box office hit in Malayalam film industry. The whole plot took us for a roller coaster of fun and laughter. Cinemas were filled with roaring laughs watching the Hollywood flicks of super characters , funky cars and wits of MOOSA . The surprising musical arrangements of the film have amused all of us and are still in our playlist . Here PRAGATHI comes up with a reprise of the epic song KAADIRANGI . Go watch ,enjoy and repeat 🔁 

Pragathi

KS Harisankar ( Vocals)
Precious Peter (Keys)
Abin Sagar (Guitars)
Abhijith Sudhi (Bass)
Abishek Amanath (Drums)

Original Song Credits

Lyrics - Gireesh Puthancheri
Music - Vidyasagar
Singer- V Devanand, Prathap, Timmi & Tippu
Movie - CID Moosa

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 146 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
When Mayura notices Tara in a life-threatening situation, she rushes to save her life. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 218 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Bondita puts her life in peril as she commences an arduous ritual on the festival of Mahashivaratri! Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Episode 745 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Cuckoo cuckoo...
Oppanai yaaru maiyilukku 
Cuckoo cuckoo
Pachchaiya poosum paasikku
Cuckoo cuckoo
Kuchchiya adukkuna kootukku 

Paadu patta makka 
Varappu mettukkaara
Vervathanni sokkaa 
Minukkum naattukkaara
Aakaatti karuppatti
Oodhaangolu mannuchatti
Aathoram koodukatti
Arambichcha naagareegam
Jhan jhana jhanakku jhana makkale
Uppuku chappu kottu
Muttaikulla saththukottu
Attaikku raththangkottu
Kittipullu vettu vettu

Naan anju maram valarthen...
Azhagana thottam vachchen...
Thottam sezhithaalum en thonda 
nanaiyalaye

En kadale karaye...
Vaname saname...
Nelame kolame...
Edame thadame...

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Paattan poottan kaaththa boomi
aatam pottu kaattum saami 
Raatinandha suththi vandha
Seva koovuchu
Adhu pottu vachcha echamdhaane
Kaada maarichu
Namma naada maarichu 
Indha veeda maarichu

Enna kora enna kora
En seeni karumbukku enna kora 
Enna kora enna kora
En chella peraandikku enna kora

Pandhalulla paavarka...
Pandhalulla paavarka
Vedhakallu vitturukku...
Vedhakallu vitturukku
Appan aathaa vittadhungo
Appan aathaa vittandhungo

Ah.....

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

#Dhee | #Arivu | #EnjoyEnjaami

snippet.title: பிரியாணி PASTA with MY LADY SUPERSTARS !! Women's Day Special - Instant Pasta from Happy Adda
snippet.description:
Pasta Orders 
WhatsApp link: https://bit.ly/2PR1y2U
Ordering link: https://happyadda.in/products/happy-adda-pasta-box 

Socials: 
Instagram: @happy.adda
Twitter: @happy_adda
Facebook: Happy Adda

India’s first truly instant pasta, Happy Adda began as a retail food chain under the name 72’s Pastas and Tacos. The founder, Gopal, wanted to use this foundation to build up into the world of instant food, while also making authentic pasta available to everyone at an affordable price.  

2020, the year no one wants to think about. The year that was fully a write off. 2020 is the year Gopal’s dream  for Happy Adda came to fruition. Happy Adda's pasta is handmade and all-natural, 100% vegetarian with absolutely no added chemicals. With a shelf life of up to a year, Happy Adda is truly instant in the sense that all you need to do to eat it, is heat it!

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Jetha Ki Shararate! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | TMKOC Comedy | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

snippet.title: പ്രസവശേഷം ഭാര്യക്ക് ഭർത്താവിന് കൊടുക്കാൻ പറ്റിയ എറ്റവും നല്ല സമ്മാനം ||  AFTER DELIVERY GIFT
snippet.description:
ഇഷ്ട്ടപെട്ട വീഡിയോസ് നിങ്ങളുടെ ഫ്രണ്ട്‌സ് & ഫാമിലി ഗ്രൂപ്പ് ഇൽ ഷെയർ ചെയ്യുക 
Kandamkulathyy Prasavaa Rakshaa Chikithsaa
#kandamkulathy
#afterpregnancycarevlog
#afterpregnancygift
#vasumidhunbabyvlog
#midhunbaby

In this video we are showing my wife vasu and her child care after pregnancy , we use kerala traditional Prasava Raksha Chikithsa is one of kandamkulath's special treatment programme ensuring postnatal care for the mother and child. Soothika ensures the health of mother and child after delivery. The this is formulated in a special way which ensures the revitalization of energy and prevention from future health complications for both mother and child and the common health problems which may arise after delivery

snippet.description:
Yashwant Sinha Joins TMC । TMC को मिला Yashwant Sinha का साथ । Bengal Election । West Bengal Polls 

अटल सरकार में वित्त मंत्री और विदेश मंत्री रह चुके यशवंत सिन्हा तृणमूल कांग्रेस में शामिल हो गए हैं। बीजेपी से इस्तीफा देने के बाद यशवंत सिन्हा काफी समय से सक्रिय राजनीति से दूर थे। शनिवार सुबह यशवंत सिन्हा कोलकाता पहुंचे और पार्टी की सदस्यता ली।

snippet.description:
AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA : Ilzaam | Pragati, Amit Aggarwal, Soyab | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Sonotek Music

Sonotek Music Presenting " Ilzaam " a New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Ilzaam Song Starring Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Pragati, Anil Aggarwal, Soyab. This Superhit Haryanvi Song Sung by Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Penned by Krishan Madha. Music given by Raju Punjabi. this video directed by Sp. Music Label by Sonotek Music

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SHARE !! SUBSCRIBE

#Ilzaam #AmitSainiRohtakiya #PRaGati #SonotekMusic #AnilAggarwal #SoyabKhan #LatestHaryanviSongs2021 #NewHaryaviSongsHaryanavi2021 #LatestHaryanviSong2021 #NewHaryanviSongs2021#haryanviSongs2021


Rae tanae dhokhe aali foonk tae bujayi baati rae
baat kari ghani tanae taati taati rae
maada tame dekh kae nae kalaa chhod diya
reha koni yaar ka aaj koye sathi rae
rae kuchh reha bhi ni baaki ghani khelgi chalaaki
ib kis nae bta de badnaam kah du mae

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae tanae dhokhe aala teer sidha maarya chhati main
rae nash nash main terae dhokha bharya
jhoothi saachi baat manae maani saari saachi rae
tere chakkar main aake manae kaand tha karya
teri baat saari jaali teri baat thi rae jaali
kisne bta de tera naam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae maade aala krishan bhukha pyar ka tha
bas dhokha bharya teri neet main
tanae pyar aali baaji khwli dhokae tai
usne samajh baithi jeet rae
anil agarwal kare pyar aaj bhi
rae roj tere naam ka ek jaam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

snippet.title: EXCLUSIVE: The Untold Journey Of Rishab Shetty | Sandalwood | Directed By ANUSHREE
snippet.description:
Click to Subscribe:- https://bit.ly/AnushreeAnchor
ಬಾಲ್ಯದ ನೆನಪುಗಳು, ಜೀವನದ ಸಂಘರ್ಷಗಳು, ಇನ್ನು ಎಷ್ಟೋ ಘಟನೆಗಳು.
It is time to hear the childhood memories, life's treacheries and many more eventful stories of the Kannada actor and Film-maker Rishab Shetty. In an exclusive interview directed by Anushree Anchor. What's more interesting here is his way of talks. Listen to his candid nature, speaking and sharing intriguing instances from his life. Gather moments of humour and a tinge of heartfulness from the latest Kannada interview. 
I hope you enjoy the episode, don’t forget to like, share and subscribe to my channel! 😉

snippet.title: Chakkappazham | Flowers | Ep#149
snippet.description:
